title: Reproducible Documents possible flow for Data Scientists

posts.author: uriahf (Uriah Finkel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone.

I’m struggliing with the usage of monday as a data scientist.

I’m working as a Data Scientist and I want to make a sharable and trackable document that is rendered from code, but I also want to make it accessible for discussion with nono-technical domain experts.

I’m using Python/R to produce Office/HTML documents, than I upload them to Monday and than I can have a discussion.

Some issues with this kind of flow:

  1. I cannot preview HTML documents on Monday.
  2. Discussions on Office documents cannot be placed on specific place in the documents (like in google docs, or Office Word in the document).

The solution I would like to have is being able to upload some raw text, maybe Markdown or something alike to Monday Document.

Are there any better alternatives?

Thanks

Uriah
